summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Velora MVP-1. 31/31 pytest backend tests passed (auth, onboarding, mood + analytics, journal + AI sentiment, habits + seeding/toggle, chat SSE streaming, voice TTS + transcribe smoke, assessments, sleep, sessions, dashboard, insights, emergency). All 10 frontend e2e flows passed (register, 8-step onboarding, dashboard, mood log, habits toggle, journal+AI insight, chat streaming, breathing animation, anxiety assessment with 5 answers, profile + sleep log + SOS dialog).

issues: Page defaults to LOGIN mode (Sign in), but landing page CTA is 'Get started' which conventionally signals registration. New users must click 'Create an account' toggle to register. Consider defaulting to register mode when arrived via Get started CTA, or rename CTA to 'Sign in / Sign up'.

action_items: (Minor UX) Consider defaulting /auth to register mode when user arrives from Landing 'Get started' CTA (e.g., /auth?mode=register), since 'Get started' typically implies new user.

(Doc) The original review request listed age testid `onb-age-18-24`; actual age groups in UI are 13-17 / 18-22 / 23-27 / 28-35 / 36+. Spec/docs should be updated to match the real testids (onb-age-18-22, etc.).
Voice transcribe endpoint not exercised with real audio (skipped per request). Recommend manual smoke before launch.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 724 lines — consider splitting routers (auth/mood/journal/habits/chat/etc.) into separate modules for maintainability.
POST /api/voice/speak and similar endpoints use `payload: dict` instead of a Pydantic model; loses input validation. Replace with a proper request model.
GET /api/emergency/resources has no auth dependency while other endpoints require it — intentional (panic safety) but should be explicitly documented.

Habit toggle re-sets `last_completed_date` to most-recent completion on uncomplete, but if user uncompletes today's after older entries, the next-day streak computation is fine; minor edge case worth a unit test.
Streak update uses local timezone via date.today() — could be inconsistent across user TZs; consider passing user's TZ from client.
models.AssessmentResult docstring lists levels low/mild/moderate/high but _interpret() returns great/okay/concerning/needs_support — clean this up.
test_credentials: Created throwaway test users per run: test_velora_<uuid>@velora.app / testpass1234 (backend) and test_ui2_<uuid>@velora.app / uitest1234 (frontend). The seed accounts demo@velora.app / velora1234 and qa@velora.app / qa123456 must be created manually (not auto-seeded).
seed_data_creation: Default 8 habits are auto-seeded on first GET /api/habits per user. No global seeds created — backend test_register_duplicate guarantees fresh emails per run via uuid.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_velora_api.py — run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_velora_api.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Tests use unique uuid suffix on email so safe to rerun. UI tests covered all 10 nav routes via data-testid selectors; key gotcha: /auth defaults to LOGIN — click `auth-toggle-mode` to switch to register. Age testIds use ranges 13-17, 18-22, 23-27, 28-35, 36+ (NOT 18-24). Chat SSE streaming + journal sentiment AI calls take 8-12s — use generous waits.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failures after correcting test selectors. Initial test had two avoidable mistakes (assuming /auth defaults to register; using wrong age range testid) — both were test-script issues, not app bugs.
